creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 156712
Patch to update net/liferea

- Update to 1.10.15
- Add patch, in order to avoid warning when Python loader is launched. devel/libpeas uses Python3, so here loader must be also Python3.

(liferea:20275): libpeas-WARNING **: Failed to load module 'pythonloader': Cannot open "/usr/local/lib/libpeas-1.0/loaders/libpythonloader.so"

(liferea:20275): libpeas-WARNING **: Could not load plugin loader 'python'
